mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO grammar_weak_points (recording_id, user_id, item_id, label, grammar_type, forgetting_score, recommendation, mastery_level, next_review_at, score_source, updated_at) VALUES (#{recordingId}, #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{label}, #{grammarType}, #{forgettingScore}, #{recommendation}, #{masteryLevel}, #{nextReviewAt}, #{scoreSource}, now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET recording_id = EXCLUDED.recording_id, label = EXCLUDED.label, grammar_type = EXCLUDED.grammar_type, forgetting_score = EXCLUDED.forgetting_score, recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation, mastery_level = EXCLUDED.mastery_level, next_review_at = EXCLUDED.next_review_at, score_source = EXCLUDED.score_source, updated_at = now()
WHERE NOT (grammar_weak_points.score_source = 'JAVA_ENGINE' AND EXCLUDED.score_source = 'PYTHON_LEGACY')
